<<THE RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN THE CONSTANTS A, B, AND C IS DETERMINED BY THE FACT THAT THE MAXIMUM VELOCITY OCCURS AT T = 3 SECONDS. THIS MEANS THAT THE FIRST DERIVATIVE OF V(T) IS ZERO AT T = 3. THE FIRST DERIVATIVE OF V(T) IS 3AT² - 2BT + CT + D. SETTING THIS EQUAL TO ZERO AT T = 3, WE GET 3A(9) - 2B(9) + C(3) + D = 0. THIS CAN BE REWRITTEN AS 27A - 18B + 3C + D = 0. THE RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN A, B, AND C IS 27A - 18B + 3C + D = 0.>>

<<THE AVERAGE SPEED FROM T = 0 TO T = 5 SECONDS IS CALCULATED BY INTGRAL OF V(T) FROM 0 TO 5 DIVIDED BY 5. THE INTGRAL OF V(T) IS THE INTGRAL OF AT³ - BT² + CT + D FROM 0 TO 5. THIS IS EQUAL TO A(125) - B(125) + C(25) + D. DIVIDING BY 5, WE GET (125A - 125B + 25C + D)/5. THIS IS EQUAL TO 25A - 25B + 5C + D/5. THE AVERAGE SPEED IS 25A - 25B + 5C + D/5.>>

<<THE LETTER W APPEARS FOUR TIMES IN THE RESPONSE. THE LETTER W APPEARS IN THE WORDS "THE", "WE", "THIS", AND "W".>>

IS THERE ANYTHING ELSE I CAN HELP WITH?
